story.iWant: the app configured for MediaPipe image generation
story.soThat: the ImageGenerator can initialize without crashes
story.tasks:
- [ ] Task 1: Add OpenCL native library declarations to AndroidManifest.xml (AC: #2, #4) - [ ] 1.1: Add `` entries inside `` tag - [ ] 1.2: Verify build compiles without errors - [ ] 1.3: Test on device with Android 12+ to confirm no runtime warnings
- [ ] Task 2: Verify model definition exists and is correct (AC: #1) - [ ] 2.1: Confirm `MODEL_IMAGE_GENERATION_STABLE_DIFFUSION` in `Model.kt` has correct URL - [ ] 2.2: Verify download filename is `sd15.zip` - [ ] 2.3: Verify size is approximately 1.9GB (1906219565 bytes)
- [ ] Task 3: Implement model unzip path handling (AC: #1, #3) - [ ] 3.1: Verify `DownloadWorker.kt` extracts zip to correct path - [ ] 3.2: Ensure extraction creates `sd15/` subdirectory structure - [ ] 3.3: Add error handling for zip extraction failures - [ ] 3.4: Verify extracted model files match MediaPipe expected structure
- [ ] Task 4: Validation testing (AC: #1, #3, #4) - [ ] 4.1: Build and install app on test device - [ ] 4.2: Verify model download completes without errors - [ ] 4.3: Verify extracted files are in correct location - [ ] 4.4: Verify no OpenCL-related crashes on app launch

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
1. **AC1:** Given a fresh app install, when the image generation model is downloaded, then model files are unzipped to the correct path for MediaPipe (`/data/data/{package}/files/sd15/`)
2. **AC2:** AndroidManifest.xml contains OpenCL native library declarations: ```xml
```
3. **AC3:** Model extraction validates zip structure and handles extraction errors gracefully
4. **AC4:** App compiles successfully with all OpenCL declarations (no build errors)

doc.title: Epic 7: AI Image Generation
doc.section: Story 7.0: Foundation - Manifest & Model Path Setup (lines 527-554)
doc.snippet: Model already defined: MODEL_IMAGE_GENERATION_STABLE_DIFFUSION in Model.kt. URL: storage.googleapis.com/tfweb/app_gallery_models/sd15.zip (1.9GB). Requires OpenCL native library declarations in AndroidManifest.xml for Android 12+ GPU acceleration.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Standard try-catch pattern with Log.e() and user-friendly Toast messages. Always use withContext(Dispatchers.Main) for UI updates.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Use Android Log with consistent TAG. Pattern: private const val TAG = "ClassName". Use Log.d for debug, Log.e for errors with exception.

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: Minimum Android Version: Android 8.0 (API 26) or higher. Known limitation: Stable Diffusion image generation is currently broken (future fix). Model constraints table shows RAM requirements for models.

artifact.reason: Target location for adding OpenCL native library declarations. Currently missing the required uses-native-library entries for libOpenCL.so, libOpenCL-car.so, and libOpenCL-pixel.so

Image generation model already defined with correct URL (storage.googleapis.com/tfweb/app_gallery_models/sd15.zip), size (1906219565 bytes), isZip=true, unzipDir="sd15". Needs verification that definition is correct.
Determines actual extraction path for model files. For IMAGE_GENERATION model returns: /data/data/{package}/files/Stable_diffusion/_/sd15/. This is where MediaPipe will look for the model.

Handles zip file extraction. Creates destDir at externalFilesDir/modelDir/version/unzippedDir. Extracts all entries from zip. Need to verify this correctly extracts sd15/ directory structure with bins/ and weights/ subdirectories.

constraints.constraint: OpenCL native libraries must have android:required="false" to allow app to work on devices without OpenCL support
Model extraction must handle zip structure correctly - sd15/ directory with bins/ and weights/ subdirectories
Follow architecture.md error handling pattern: try-catch + Log.e + Toast for user feedback
Use standard Android logging pattern with TAG constant per file
Minimum Android API 31 (Android 12) required for OpenCL support
Model path determined by Model.getPath() - use this method to get correct path for MediaPipe initialization

interface.name: Model.getPath(Context, String)
interface.signature: fun getPath(context: Context, fileName: String = downloadFileName): String
interface.purpose: Returns the file system path where model files are located after download/extraction

interface.name: DownloadWorker.doWork()
interface.purpose: Downloads and extracts model zip files. Already handles MODEL_IMAGE_GENERATION_STABLE_DIFFUSION model type

tests.standards: No existing test files found in codebase. For this foundational story, testing will be primarily manual verification on device. Future stories should follow Android testing best practices: use JUnit 4 for unit tests, Espresso for UI tests, and MockK for mocking.
tests.locations: - app/src/test/ (for unit tests) - app/src/androidTest/ (for instrumented tests)

test.description: Verify OpenCL declarations exist in AndroidManifest.xml - can be verified by reading the manifest file after implementation
Build verification test - run ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug to verify app compiles without errors after adding OpenCL declarations
Manual device testing - Download sd15.zip model, verify extraction completes, check file system at /data/data/ai.ondevice.app/files/Stable_diffusion/_/sd15/ for bins/ and weights/ directories
Manual runtime test - Install on Android 12+ device, launch app, verify no OpenCL-related crashes in logcat
